title: Yorke, Rupert - Deputy Chief of Staff, No.10 - ACOBA Advice
body: "Mr Yorke left his role at No. 10 in July 2024.  Senior Director, Forward Global (United Kingdom) Ltd  Mr Yorke sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Forward Global (United Kingdom) Ltd. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in April 2025 and the appointment was taken up in May 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  "
